purpose: Refresh managed mother_doc artifacts only after reading the latest skill result produced by the runtask subagent.
rules: Refresh must read the latest skill facade, runtime contracts, governance rules, runstates, and runtask evidence first.
Refresh must show rule changes through observable artifact structure, field semantics, frontmatter, document relations, and consumer boundaries.
Refresh must use keyword-first structure decisions instead of unconditional full reset.
